# PERF-033 positive: range over a large slice in a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-033-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Process(c *gin.Context) {
	items := c.GetStringSlice("items")
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		total += len(item)
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"total": total})
}
